svg.title: Internet Recovery 98 ten-site production design overview
svg.desc: Ten clean site cards show each original identity, Act I repair, midpoint change, finish, and authored reading-unit count.
svg.text: INTERNET RECOVERY 98 · TEN-SITE PRODUCTION DESIGN OVERVIEW

g.text: Consensus Cascade: ten accounts, one source.
Honest Zero; recovered posts stay saved.
Apply to Everyone overlays saved profiles.
Six modules become one generated stream.
Autoplay counts ten loops as confirmation.
Five costumes; every result hits one cache.
One return creates two replacement orders.
Fake pre-account history replaces the queue.
The destination moves to preserve the ETA.
3 anchor units; unit 3 includes goal choice.

svg.text: ONLY THE READING COMPANION IS SCORED · EVERY SITE SAVES EACH UNIT · MIDPOINTS PRESERVE WORK · SECURED STATES STAY SECURED
